posts.author: nivas_k
posts.text: Repeated critical failures in Kite API — A patch has already been deployed, and we have verified that the issue is no longer occurring. Please check at your end as well, and do let us know if you continue to notice any discrepancies or have further concerns.

posts.author: siva
posts.text: Repeated critical failures in Kite API — We are following up on this, please give us a few more days for permanent fix.

posts.author: Siddharth_Raghuraman
posts.text: Repeated critical failures in Kite API — 1 month since your response and almost 4 months since I first highlighted this here and this issue continues as is, unaddressed and with the same scale of thoudands of incorrect ticks across instruments every day sample from today: {“instrument_token”: 144067335, “LTP”: 238.0, “bid_price_1”: 237.7 , “bid_quantity_1”: 1, “ask_price_1”: 237.6 , “ask_quantity_1”: 1, “bid_price_2”: 236.9, “bid_quantity_2”: 1, “ask_price_2”: 237.7, “ask_quantity_2”: 2, “bid_price_3”: 236.7, “bid_quantity_3”: 2, “ask_price_3”: 237.8, “ask_quantity_3”: 3, “bid_price_4”: 236.5,…
